resources.string: Battery %d per cent; charging paused for battery protection.
Battery %1$d per cent; %2$s, charging paused for battery protection.

Tap to open accessibility features. Customise or replace this button in Settings.
View settings
Mobile data won't automatically switch based on availability
You have %s battery left. Battery Saver turns on Dark theme, restricts background activity and delays notifications.
Battery Saver turns on Dark theme, restricts background activity and delays notifications.
Your organisation only allows you to make calls from work apps

To open an app using a widget, you'll need to verify that it's you. Also, bear in mind that anyone can view them, even when your tablet's locked. Some widgets may not have been intended for your lock screen and may be unsafe to add here.
Couldn’t access %1$s. Check the %2$s app to make sure that the control is still available and that the app settings haven’t changed.
Hold and drag to rearrange controls

You can add controls for your external devices to the lock screen.
Your device app may allow you to control some devices without unlocking your phone or tablet.
You can make changes at any time in Settings.
Show and control devices from the lock screen?
Control devices from the lock screen?
Add, remove and reorder your widgets in this space

If you turn off system optimisation and turn on Battery saver, Dark mode will be turned on automatically. To turn off Dark mode, turn off Battery saver, or turn on system optimisation in Settings > Developer options > Turn on system optimisation.

The data limit that you set has been reached. You are no longer using mobile data.
If you resume, charges may apply for data usage.
%1$s will no longer show live updates. You can change this at any time in Settings.
Allow any widget on the lock screen?
This app can only be opened in one window
The name and picture that you choose will be visible to anyone who uses this device.

To set up Face Unlock again, your current face model will be deleted.
You'll need to set up this feature again to use your face to unlock your phone.
Couldn't set up Face Unlock. Go to Settings to try again.
{count,plural, =1{# app is active}other{# apps are active}}

To set up Fingerprint Unlock again, your current fingerprint images and models will be deleted.
After they're deleted, you'll need to set up Fingerprint Unlock again to use your fingerprint to unlock your phone or verify that it's you.

To set up Fingerprint Unlock again, your current fingerprint images and model will be deleted.
After they're deleted, you'll need to set up Fingerprint Unlock again to use your fingerprint to unlock your phone or verify that it's you.
Couldn't set up Fingerprint Unlock. Go to Settings to try again.
Your device is getting warm near the charging port. If it’s connected to a charger or USB accessory, unplug it and take care as the cable may also be warm.

Your phone will automatically try to cool down. You can still use your phone, but it may run more slowly.
Once your phone has cooled down, it will run normally.
Access your favourite widgets and screen savers while charging.
This input method may be able to collect all the text that you type, including personal data like passwords and credit card numbers. It comes from the app %1$s. Use this input method?
App opened without being installed. Tap to find out more.
Can't unlock with face. Too many attempts.
{count,plural, =1{Enter SIM PIN. You have # remaining attempt before you must contact your operator to unlock your device.}other{Enter SIM PIN. You have # remaining attempts.}}

{count,plural, =1{SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. You have # remaining attempt before SIM becomes permanently unusable. Contact operator for details.}other{SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. You have # remaining attempts before SIM becomes permanently unusable. Contact operator for details.}}
{count,plural, =1{Incorrect SIM PIN code; you have # remaining attempt before you must contact your operator to unlock your device.}other{Incorrect SIM PIN code; you have # remaining attempts. }}
Incorrect SIM PIN code; you must now contact your operator to unlock your device.

{count,plural, =1{Incorrect SIM PUK code; you have # remaining attempt before SIM becomes permanently unusable.}other{Incorrect SIM PUK code, you have # remaining attempts before SIM becomes permanently unusable.}}
SIM is unusable. Contact your operator.
Device was locked – too many authentication attempts
Device updated Enter password to continue.
Device updated Enter PIN to continue.
Added security required. Device hasn't been unlocked for a while.
Password is required after the device restarts
Pattern is required after the device restarts
PIN is required after the device restarts
SIM is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. Contact operator for details.
SIM "%1$s" is now disabled. Enter PUK code to continue. Contact operator for details.
You can restart the app so that it looks better on your screen, but you may lose your progress or any unsaved changes

Device logs record what happens on your device. Apps can use these logs to find and fix issues.
Some logs may contain sensitive info, so only allow apps that you trust to access all device logs.
If you don’t allow this app to access all device logs, it can still access its own logs. Your device manufacturer may still be able to access some logs or info on your device.
When you're sharing your entire screen, anything on your screen is visible to %s. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
When you're sharing an app, anything shown or played in that app is visible to %s. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
When you're casting your entire screen, anything on your screen is visible. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
When you're casting an app, anything shown or played in that app is visible. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
Go to Settings > Notifications & Control centre for more options
Applied successfully. Go to Settings > Notifications & Control centre for more options.
You won't have access to data or the Internet through %s. Internet will only be available via Wi-Fi.
This device is connected to the Internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin.
Your organisation installed a certificate authority in your work profile. Your secure network traffic may be monitored or modified.
Your work apps are connected to the Internet through %1$s. Your network activity in work apps, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin and VPN provider.

This device belongs to your organisation.
Your IT admin can monitor and manage settings, corporate access, apps, data associated with your device and your device's location information.
For more information, contact your IT admin.
Your organisation installed a certificate authority on this device. Your secure network traffic may be monitored or modified.
This device is connected to the Internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to the VPN provider.
This device is managed by your parent. Your parent can see and manage information such as the apps that you use, your location and your screen time.
Your personal apps are connected to the Internet through %1$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your VPN provider.
This device is connected to the Internet through %1$s and %2$s. Your network activity, including emails and browsing data, is visible to your IT admin.

%1$s may be able to access data associated with this device, manage apps and change this device's settings.
If you have questions, contact %2$s.
Your recent conversations will show here
No, don't make them an admin
{count,plural, =1{# more notification inside.}other{# more notifications inside.}}
See recent messages, missed calls and status updates
<Data>You have to <font color=#a5220e>erase all data </font>on your device, including photos and contacts, and then set a new Lock screen password.</Data>
<Data>Power off your device, press and hold the <font color=#a5220e>Power button</font> and the <font color=#a5220e>Volume up button</font> simultaneously until you see the Mi logo.</Data>
<Data>Select <font color=#a5220e>"Wipe & Reset"</font> and wait until the device reboots.</Data>
All Quick Settings tiles will reset to the device's original settings
Your organisation may monitor network traffic in your work profile
Your work apps are connected to the Internet through %1$s
This device belongs to your organisation
Your organisation owns this device and may monitor network traffic
This device belongs to your organisation and is connected to the Internet through %1$s
This device belongs to your organisation and is connected to the Internet through VPNs
This device belongs to %1$s and is connected to the Internet through %2$s
This device belongs to %1$s and is connected to the Internet through VPNs
This device is connected to the Internet through %1$s
Your personal apps are connected to the Internet through %1$s
This device is connected to the Internet through VPNs
Press and hold the Menu button to unpin this app
To unpin this app, touch and hold Back and Home buttons
Sound from your device, like music, calls and ringtones
When you're recording your entire screen, anything displayed on your screen is recorded. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
When you're recording an app, anything displayed or played in that app is recorded. So be careful with things like passwords, payment details, messages, photos, audio and video.
Taking screenshots isn't allowed by the app or your organisation
Tap a conversation to add it to your home screen
To create this shortcut, press the action key and one or more other keys together
Press and hold the [Power] and [Volume +] buttons until you see .
<Data>Select <font color=#e6e6e6>[Wipe data]</font> and tap <font color=#e6e6e6>[Reboot]</font> after that.</Data>

Your phone was too hot, so it turned off to cool down. Your phone is now running normally.
Your phone may get too hot if you: • Use resource-intensive apps (such as gaming, video or navigation apps) • Download or upload large files • Use your phone in high temperatures
You won't receive notifications about app behaviour during this session
Get quick access to your favourite app widgets without unlocking your tablet.
Your device is overheated. Can't use torch now.
These experimental features may change, break or disappear in future releases. Proceed with caution.
System UI Tuner gives you extra ways to tweak and customise the Android user interface. These experimental features may change, break or disappear in future releases. Proceed with caution.

To protect your device from liquid or debris, the USB port is disabled and won’t detect any accessories.
You’ll be notified when it’s OK to use the USB port again.

You can share this device with other people by creating additional users. Each user has their own space, which they can customise with apps, wallpaper and so on. Users can also adjust device settings such as Wi‑Fi that affect everyone.
When you add a new user, that person needs to set up their space.
Any user can update apps for all other users. Accessibility settings and services may not transfer to the new user.

Admins have special privileges that other users don't. An admin can manage all users, update or reset this device, modify settings, see all installed apps and grant or revoke admin privileges for others.
There was a problem getting your cards. Please try again later.

{DEVICE_TYPE,select, PHONE{Can't connect. Please check your phone settings and try again.}TABLET{Can't connect. Please check your tablet settings and try again.}COMPUTER{Can't connect. Please check your computer settings and try again.}WATCH{Can't connect. Please check your watch settings and try again.}VEHICLE{Can't connect. Please check your vehicle settings and try again.}other{Can't connect. Please check your device settings and try again.}}

{DEVICE_TYPE,select, PHONE{{NETWORK_NAME} from your phone}TABLET{{NETWORK_NAME} from your tablet}COMPUTER{{NETWORK_NAME} from your computer}WATCH{{NETWORK_NAME} from your watch}VEHICLE{{NETWORK_NAME} from your vehicle}other{{NETWORK_NAME} from your device}}
Connected to device. Can't provide Internet.
Place your device on the centre of the charging base
{count,plural, =0{No active modes}=1{{mode} is active}other{# modes are active}}
